title: Piquant Juicy Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A weeknight Greek dish featuring vin-santo and ferment-kimchi, these lamb skewers are both juicy and full of flavor, perfect for a satvik-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together vin-santo, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
While the lamb is cooking, mix the chopped ferment-kimchi with lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once the lamb is cooked, brush the kimchi mixture onto the skewers.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional oregano if desired.
